name: deploy
description: **Horror Roki** is a beautiful, installable, no-server personal horror movie companion.

scripts.build:pages: mkdir -p .pages-dist && cp index.html manifest.json .pages-dist/ && cp -R js .pages-dist/ && cp styles.css .pages-dist/
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:pages && wrangler pages deploy .pages-dist --project-name brous-movie-engine --branch main --commit-dirty=true
